stemHtml: Consider the Threat and Error Management (TEM) model. A flight crew experiences an undesired aircraft state (UAS). The most correct course of action is to…

options.a: Continue with the current configuration as an UAS is not an outcome and therefore the safety of the flight remains unaffected.
options.b: Continue with the current configuration and file a safety report upon landing.
options.c: Take immediate countermeasures to recover to a normal operational state.
options.d: Contact the Operator and request to practice this specific situation in the next training session.
